# Road

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Road icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="Road" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Road;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Road { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
road, street, highway, route, path, transport, traffic, drive, map

## Categories
transportation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/road)
